intro: Real engagements, verified facts, live links. No invented numbers.

caseStudies.tagline: Retained software engineering for a 46-year island wholesaler
caseStudies.summary: IDI is a family wholesale food distributor serving Guam, Rota, Tinian, Saipan, and Majuro since 1980. Anchor Marianas is IDI's retained software engineer, shipping and maintaining the company's web presence and internal tooling.
deliverables: Production Next.js 14 / TypeScript site, live at idiguam.vercel.app
Open a Wholesale Account lead-capture funnel (/account) with reliable form delivery and email fallback
LocalBusiness JSON-LD, per-page SEO, dynamic sitemap and OG image, llms.txt
Vercel Analytics and Speed Insights wired in
Python data-intake validator for operations data
